subcodes.first_line: O my God and Ultimate Goal of yearning souls whose hearts' oceans surge with the holy breezes of Thy oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و منتهی مقصد المشتاقین المتدفقه بحور افئدتهم باریاح قدس توحیدک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love of God
